name: oid-knowledge-lab
description: Responsible OID knowledge-base crawler and analysis workspace.

scripts.check: node --check deploy/alibaba-function-compute-qwen-handler.js && node --check src/agentSubmissionPack.js && node --check src/assetAudit.js && node --check src/buyerSignalPack.js && node --check src/clientKickoffPack.js && node --check src/clientReadinessPack.js && node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/coverage.js && node --check src/crawlPlan.js && node --check src/crawlState.js && node --check src/decisionOnePager.js && node --check src/deliveryPack.js && node --check src/engagementBrief.js && node --check src/ianaPen.js && node --check src/intakePack.js && node --check src/manifest.js && node --check src/mediaProvenancePack.js && node --check src/net.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check src/proofDeskPack.js && node --check src/proposalPack.js && node --check src/publishGuard.js && node --check src/qwenAgent.js && node --check src/qwenSubmissionPack.js && node --check src/remediationBoard.js && node --check src/report.js && node --check src/site.js && node --check src/robots.js && node --check src/sitemap.js && node --check src/sourcePolicy.js && node --check src/statementOfWorkPack.js && node --check src/verticalUseCasePack.js && node --check tests/oidKnowledge.test.js
scripts.build:site: node src/cli.js build-site --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --out public
scripts.plan:authorized-full-crawl: node src/cli.js plan-full-crawl --out reports/authorized-crawl-plan.json --markdown reports/authorized-crawl-plan.md --delay-ms 1500 --crawl-out data/full
scripts.audit:dataset: node src/cli.js audit-dataset --sitemap reports/oid-base-sitemap-index.json --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --out reports/dataset-manifest.json
scripts.refresh:publishable: npm run export:sitemap-index && npm run import:iana-pen && npm run source-policy && npm run plan:authorized-full-crawl && node src/cli.js build-site --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --sitemap reports/oid-base-sitemap-index.json --out public && npm run audit:dataset
scripts.import:iana-pen: node src/cli.js import-iana-pen --out data/iana --report reports/iana-pen-summary.json --public-index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json
scripts.audit:assets: node src/cli.js audit-assets --in examples/sample-assets.csv --out reports/asset-audit.json --markdown reports/asset-audit.md
scripts.audit:certificate-policy: node src/cli.js audit-assets --in examples/certificate-policy-assets.csv --out reports/certificate-policy-oid-audit.json --markdown reports/certificate-policy-oid-audit.md
scripts.remediation:sample: node src/cli.js remediation-board --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --out reports/remediation-board.json --markdown reports/remediation-board.md --csv reports/remediation-board.csv
scripts.coverage:oid: node src/cli.js coverage-report --pen-index reports/iana-pen-public-index.json --sitemap reports/oid-base-sitemap-index.json --out reports/coverage-report.json --markdown reports/coverage-report.md
scripts.delivery:sample: node src/cli.js delivery-pack --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --markdown reports/sample-delivery-pack.md
scripts.brief:sample: node src/cli.js engagement-brief --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --source-policy reports/source-policy.json --markdown reports/sample-engagement-brief.md
scripts.readiness:client: node src/cli.js client-readiness-pack --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --source-policy reports/source-policy.json --out reports/client-readiness-pack.json --markdown reports/client-readiness-pack.md
scripts.fit:vertical: node src/cli.js vertical-use-case-pack --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --source-policy reports/source-policy.json --out reports/vertical-use-case-pack.json --markdown reports/vertical-use-case-pack.md
scripts.proposal:scope: node src/cli.js scope-proposal-pack --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --source-policy reports/source-policy.json --client-readiness reports/client-readiness-pack.json --vertical-fit reports/vertical-use-case-pack.json --out reports/scope-proposal-pack.json --markdown reports/scope-proposal-pack.md
scripts.sow:oid: node src/cli.js statement-of-work-pack --scope-proposal reports/scope-proposal-pack.json --client-readiness reports/client-readiness-pack.json --vertical-fit reports/vertical-use-case-pack.json --out reports/statement-of-work-pack.json --markdown reports/statement-of-work-pack.md
scripts.decision:one-pager: node src/cli.js decision-one-pager --statement-of-work reports/statement-of-work-pack.json --scope-proposal reports/scope-proposal-pack.json --client-readiness reports/client-readiness-pack.json --vertical-fit reports/vertical-use-case-pack.json --out reports/decision-one-pager.json --markdown reports/decision-one-pager.md
scripts.kickoff:client: node src/cli.js client-kickoff-pack --decision-one-pager reports/decision-one-pager.json --statement-of-work reports/statement-of-work-pack.json --client-readiness reports/client-readiness-pack.json --out reports/client-kickoff-pack.json --markdown reports/client-kickoff-pack.md
scripts.signal:buyer: node src/cli.js buyer-signal-pack --asset-audit reports/asset-audit.json --coverage reports/coverage-report.json --source-policy reports/source-policy.json --out reports/buyer-signal-pack.json --markdown reports/buyer-signal-pack.md
scripts.media:provenance: node src/cli.js media-provenance-pack --assets examples/media-provenance-assets.json --out reports/media-provenance-pack.json --markdown reports/media-provenance-pack.md --generated-at 2026-06-30T00:00:00.000Z
scripts.hackathon:backblaze: node src/cli.js backblaze-readiness-pack --assets examples/media-provenance-assets.json --out reports/backblaze-readiness-pack.json --markdown reports/backblaze-readiness-pack.md --generated-at 2026-06-30T00:00:00.000Z
scripts.proofdesk:pack: node src/cli.js proofdesk-pack --claims examples/proofdesk-claims.json --out reports/proofdesk-pack.json --markdown reports/proofdesk-pack.md --generated-at 2026-06-30T00:00:00.000Z
scripts.audit:local: npm run check && npm test && npm run audit:assets && npm run audit:certificate-policy && npm run remediation:sample && npm run coverage:oid && npm run delivery:sample && npm run brief:sample && npm run readiness:client && npm run fit:vertical && npm run proposal:scope && npm run sow:oid && npm run decision:one-pager && npm run kickoff:client && npm run signal:buyer && npm run agent:qwen:demo && npm run agent:qwen:submission-pack && npm run build:site && npm run audit:dataset && npm run guard:publishable
scripts.agent:qwen:submission-pack: node src/cli.js qwen-submission-pack --out reports/qwen-submission-pack.json --markdown reports/qwen-submission-pack.md --mermaid reports/qwen-architecture.mmd --svg public/qwen-architecture.svg --html public/qwen-architecture.html
